flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Osceola Technical College fell 72% between 2021 and 2024 (67.2% → 18.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Osceola Technical College rose 104% between 2006 and 2009 (25.9% → 52.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Osceola Technical College rose 60% between 2021 and 2024 (325 → 519).
